title: Chmod Calculator
description: Toggle the permission matrix or type octal to build chmod commands both ways

notice.title: About file permissions
notice.body: Linux/Unix permissions combine read(4)/write(2)/execute(1) for owner, group and others. Toggle the matrix, or type an octal value to drive everything in reverse.

matrix.heading: Permission matrix
matrix.hint: The number in parentheses is each permission's octal value.

special.heading: Special bits
special.hint: Special bits change the matching execute character in the symbolic notation.

setuid.label: Setuid (4)
setuid.desc: Run as the file owner; affects the owner execute bit (x→s / S)

setgid.label: Setgid (2)
setgid.desc: Run as the file group; affects the group execute bit (x→s / S)

sticky.label: Sticky (1)
sticky.desc: Only the owner may delete files in the directory; affects the others execute bit (x→t / T)

input.heading: Reverse input
input.label: Octal permission
input.error: Enter a valid octal permission: 3 or 4 digits, each 0-7 (e.g. 755, 4755).
